data.body: LANDED on main. All 3 stories merged into feature/grounding-t2 (changes 260/261/262, both bot gates MAX each). Created --no-ff merge-back (change 263), passed LLM-Review (carries) + Verified (CI re-ran), submitted -> gerrit/main now at merge commit 392408f19; replicates to GitHub. Closing epic 850f.
